---
title: "Lecture 5: EDA and Graphs"
date: 2025-07-10
summary: "<strong>Data Analysis and Graphs</strong>"
url_slides: 05-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/05-eda
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Readings
